llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Upcoming Project Submission

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the group project currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for approaching you with this request so close to the deadline, as I understand the importance of adhering to all academic timelines. Unfortunately, unforeseen personal circumstances have recently arisen that have significantly impacted my ability to dedicate the necessary time to this assignment. Specifically, a sudden family medical emergency required my immediate attention over the past forty-eight hours, making it impossible to complete the research and drafting phases by the original deadline.

I have been working diligently on the project and have already completed the initial data collection and outline. However, the unexpected nature of these events means I cannot guarantee the high quality of work required without additional time. I do not have any specific reasons for requesting the extension beyond these genuine personal challenges, but I assure you that my commitment to this course remains unwavering. Extending the deadline by two additional days would allow me to finalize the report thoroughly and submit a polished product that meets your expectations. I am happy to provide any further documentation regarding my situation if needed. Thank you for your time and understanding regarding this difficult matter.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
